Class ReactivePartTreeN1qlBasedQuery

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.couchbase.repository.query.ReactiveAbstractN1qlBasedQuery
org.springframework.data.couchbase.repository.query.ReactivePartTreeN1qlBasedQuery
All Implemented Interfaces:
RepositoryQuery
@Deprecated public class ReactivePartTreeN1qlBasedQuery extends ReactiveAbstractN1qlBasedQuery
Deprecated.
A reactive RepositoryQuery for Couchbase, based on query derivation
Since:
3.0
Author:
Subhashni Balakrishnan, Michael Reiche
